data.body: Been a CVT for 30 years.  Overhead is ridiculous.  Drug companies eat their young.  We are able to diagnose more because our testing is better.  Digital xray?  $50k.  Ultrasound?  $50-75k.  CBC machine?  $30k .  I didn’t make a living wage until I went to work for a non-profit.  Yes I chose it.
